mapper.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT ub.book_id FROM user_behavior ub WHERE ub.user_id = #{userId} UNION SELECT DISTINCT c.book_id FROM cart c WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} UNION SELECT DISTINCT oi.book_id FROM order_item oi INNER JOIN `order` o ON o.id = oi.order_id WHERE o.user_id = #{userId} AND o.status IN (2, 3, 4)
UNION SELECT #{sceneBookId} AS book_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_behavior (user_id, book_id, behavior_type, score) VALUES (#{userId}, #{bookId}, #{behaviorType}, #{score})
